overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Watch Dogs: Legion) showing a character in a long leather coat walking through a rainy London-like city. The character moves from a busy street with historic architecture past iconic cylindrical modern towers, eventually reaching a waterfront promenade with views across the river.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk beside historic building and busy road

events.description: motorcycle and black car drive past on the right side of the road
traffic light changes from red to green allowing vehicles to proceed

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wet sidewalk next to a historic stone building with graffiti and ornate iron fencing

notable_agents.action: motorcycle driving along the red bus lane
pedestrian in grey suit holding umbrella walking alongside ego

ornate black metal fence along the building perimeter
distinctive modern cylindrical glass towers dominating the skyline ahead
red painted dedicated bus lane on the asphalt road
traffic signal pole showing red then green

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city sidewalk next to a historic stone building with graffiti. The street features a red bus lane with moderate traffic including motorcycles and cars. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and distinctive cylindrical towers are visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with iconic cylindrical towers and bus traffic

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the tall cylindrical towers against the cloudy sky
red double-decker bus passes by on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection while looking up at the towering cylindrical buildings

notable_agents.action: red double-decker bus driving past the intersection
pedestrian with patterned umbrella walking alongside ego

entered.detail: classic red London-style bus with advertisements on the side
contemporary glass office building with geometric facade

segments.scene_description: Moving through the intersection, the camera tilts up to emphasize the massive cylindrical towers against the overcast sky. A classic red double-decker bus passes by on the right. The historic building falls behind as modern glass structures appear on the left, and the towers loom larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with construction barriers and modern office buildings

events.description: construction worker with bright yellow gloves passes close to camera on the right
small drone flies overhead in the sky above the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk passing a construction worker and approaching a park area

notable_agents.action: construction worker in blue hard hat and yellow gloves walking alongside
pedestrian in yellow dress walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: modern curved street lamp along the sidewalk
black and orange striped construction barrier

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the street as the cylindrical towers recede into the background on the right. A construction worker in safety gear walks alongside briefly. The environment transitions toward a more open area with park trees becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside promenade with park and city skyline views

events.description: sidewalk opens into waterfront promenade with river visible on the left
passing by digital advertising billboards and park benches along the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverside path with water on the left and park grass on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera
person sitting on park bench near the grass

entered.detail: wide river with metal railing along the promenade edge
grassy park area with autumn trees
metal bench along the riverside walkway
digital advertisement screen showing portrait images
city buildings and tower visible across the river

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide waterfront promenade with the river on the left and a grassy park on the right. The character walks past benches and digital billboards while pedestrians approach from the opposite direction. The cylindrical towers are no longer visible as the view expands to show the distant city skyline across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban center that gradually opens into a wide waterfront promenade. It begins on a wet sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered stone building, moving past a red bus lane filled with traffic toward distant cylindrical towers. As the camera passes through an intersection, it tilts upward to emphasize the scale of these massive towers against an overcast sky while the historic architecture gives way to modern glass structures. The scene then shifts as the towers recede into the background and the character passes a construction worker, with the dense city street transitioning toward a more open area with park trees. Finally, the environment expands into a broad promenade where the character walks between a grassy park and the river, leaving the towers behind to reveal the distant city skyline across the water.
